'''Commando Team One''' was a [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|SpecForce]] team for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Its leader held the title [[Commando One]]. It operated behind enemy lines and was commanded by [[Kapp Dendo]]. It was present on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4.5 ABY]], at the [[Battle of Brentaal IV (Galactic Civil War)|Galactic Civil War]], and at the [[evacuation of Ciutric]]. [[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page]] apparently served with the team then as well.

In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], it once more helped [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] by investigating the [[Xenovet]] facility on [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] alongside them and the [[Katarn Commandos|Page's Commandos]], and participating at the [[Battle of Liinade III]].
